Powell today - Intraday post (22/Aug)

Weekly post (18-22/Aug)

Powell speaks 10:00 a.m. ET today.He’ll most likely signal a strategic shift away from the 2020 framework toward a more cautious, balanced approach. It is important to listen to how the Fed will talk about inflation “overshoots” and employment going forward. Markets still lean to a Sept 25 bp cut, but size/speed of any cycle remain capped by tariff-related inflation uncertainty flagged in the minutes.

Market is cautiously pricing out the odds… not confirmed yet.

Let’s look at what the market is betting on for today…

INTRADAY POST Coding today’s distribution:

We have an IC at 6305/10 - 6430/35 (serving as a cap for both up and down) and the net speed profile is positive, drawing a negatively skewed short fly around 6379.94Market is basically betting on stabilization above the daily centroid of 6357.38 towards 6394.01 (upside pivot), while simultanously hedging downside below 6344.58 (downside pivot), seeing heavy illiquidity below 6333.72 (this is where downside momentum would gain confirmation).

6371 is a significant challenge for the spot during the day. High vol is needed to break through this line into both direction. This line serves kinda like a “line in the sand” for the momentum.Upside pivot is serving as the most potential cap for the spot due to local short speed, with margin of error of 6410

We can expect upside pivot to break through only if Powell is benign, with target of the upper wing of the IC. Otherwise nothing else will happen that hasn’t already been priced in, and pin to 6371If something new hawkish narrative surprises the market, the spot will revert to the lower wing of the IC, and if spot cannot rebound above 6340, it will be pinned to the lower wing of the IC.

OptionsDepth Heatmap

Yesterday I wrote that “downside momentum is being confirmed”, it doesn’t mean that “it is confirmed, it is done”, but that it is in progress, let’s see if the week closes below the weekly lower bound or not.
